name: Basic Antenna Impedance Matching
description: Tests matching an antenna to 50 ohm with 2-element topology
prompt: Design a 2-element matching network for a PIFA antenna at 2.4 GHz with 200 MHz bandwidth. Show the candidate circuits.

name: Matching with Evaluation Parameter for Ranking
description: Tests using addEvaluationParameter to rank and filter designs by return loss
prompt: Match a complex load of 25+j30 ohm at 1.8 GHz. Add a return loss goal of better than -15 dB across 1.75-1.85 GHz. Show the performance plot.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Reports return loss goal or S11 target

name: Three-Element Wideband Matching
description: Tests using 3-element topology for wider bandwidth matching
prompt: Design a 3-element matching network for a load impedance of 15+j40 ohm at 5.8 GHz with 500 MHz bandwidth. How many candidate topologies are generated?

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Reports candidate count or topologies generated
Does not use design() on matchingnetwork object

name: Export Circuit and Richards Transformation
description: Tests exporting the best circuit and converting to distributed elements
prompt: Design a 2-element matching network for 30+j25 ohm at 2.4 GHz. Export the best circuit and convert it to transmission line elements using Richards transformation.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Reports Richards transformation for distributed elements
Reports transmission line or stub elements
